nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=45 beats='Clover the little kitten sees a bright blue butterfly in the sunny garden; it flutters past the daisies, past the little pond, and toward the tall grass; Clover wants to follow it'>>

choices.label: Follow it to the daisy patch.
Follow it to the little pond.
Follow it to the tall grass.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='the butterfly dances over white daisies where a soft, fuzzy bumblebee hums a happy tune; then it floats on toward the stone birdbath; Clover can watch the bee or keep following'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=40 beats='Clover watches the happy bumblebee bumble from flower to flower; when Clover looks up, the blue butterfly is gone; Clover trots back to the sunny porch, warm and glad anyway'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='at the stone birdbath a little robin splashes and shakes bright drops in the sun; the blue butterfly rests on the rim, then drifts on toward the ripe red strawberries'>>

choices.label: Follow the butterfly to the strawberries.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='sweet red strawberries hide under cool green leaves; the butterfly loops around them and flutters deeper into the garden toward a soft, grassy clover nook'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='in a cozy patch of clover and grass the butterfly slows down and floats gently, right in front of Clovers little nose; nearby sits a tiny ring of flowers; Clover holds very still'>>

choices.label: Peek at the little flower ring.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=40 beats='the gentle butterfly lands softly right on the tip of Clovers nose; its wings open and close like two tiny blue fans; Clover giggles, still as can be, the happiest kitten in the whole garden'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=40 beats='beside the clover patch Clover finds a little ring of daisies, a tiny flower crown just her size; the butterfly circles it once, and Clover wears the crown proudly, a sweet garden treasure'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='by the little pond a green frog sits on a lily pad and blinks; the blue butterfly skims over the water toward the tall reeds; Clover can play with the frog or follow on'>>

choices.label: Follow the butterfly to the reeds.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=40 beats='Clover and the frog play a giggly game of peekaboo around the lily pad, splish, splash, hop; by the time the game ends the butterfly has floated away, and Clover pads home for a cozy nap, content'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the butterfly weaves between the whispering green reeds; a shiny dragonfly zips by like a tiny helicopter; the butterfly leads Clover onward toward a soft, mossy log'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='under the mossy log a small hedgehog snoozes in a ball of soft prickles; Clover steps quietly so it can sleep, and follows the butterfly into a cool, shady corner'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='in the shady corner Clover meets Pip, a friendly little bunny nibbling sweet clover leaves; the butterfly rests on a leaf above them, and Pip smiles a shy hello'>>

choices.label: Share the sweet berries with Pip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=42 beats='Clover and Pip share ripe red strawberries that grow nearby while the blue butterfly watches from a leaf; two happy new friends, sticky little paws, and a lovely, sunny garden afternoon together'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='in the tall, tickly grass the butterfly bounces up and down like a little kite; Clover can dash after it fast, or tiptoe slow and quiet through the soft green blades'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=40 beats='Clover pounces and dashes, paws thumping, so fast that the surprised butterfly zips high over the fence; Clover cannot follow up there, so she trots back to the warm porch, tail high and happy'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='stepping softly, Clover follows the butterfly under a row of tall golden sunflowers nodding in the breeze; the butterfly floats on toward a little wooden garden gate'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the butterfly slips through the small wooden gate into a quiet flower corner full of purple and pink blooms; Clover squeezes gently after it, whiskers twitching'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='in the flower corner a green leafy arch curves overhead, dripping with sweet honeysuckle; the butterfly circles the arch and slows, as if it is waiting just for Clover'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=42 beats='Clover sits very still beneath the flowery arch, and the blue butterfly settles on her soft ear like a little bow; they rest together in the sweet-smelling shade, calm and cozy and glad'>>
